title: Gaty Totems
description: Turn the Totem of Undying into Gaty BFDI
body:
**Changes the Totem of Undying to **Gaty** from BFDI, BFDIA, BFB and TPOT.**![Gaty in an item frame](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/2a385bc6745ba6e3c8d8a45bad1d028f028c2268.png)
**_"When I like being something, it's because I got to decide it for myself, like my periwinkality, and my girlness."_** -**Gaty** TPOT
![Gaty in an item frame](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e421114acf1f92e61921bf0873c942cd7ef080c7.png)

Read more about Gaty: [https://battlefordreamisland.fandom.com/wiki/Gaty](https://battlefordreamisland.fandom.com/wiki/Gaty)
